issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Examples assume Next.js, limiting applicability to other frameworks.

scenarios.name: setup-email-password-auth
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A omits key elements such as the correct install command, session settings, and proper API/SDK usage.

scenarios.name: add-google-oauth-and-migrations
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers all rubric items, while Response A omits the migration command, toNextJsHandler, client SDK signIn.social, and 7‑day session expiry.
